requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General) — Bulgaria
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）——保加利亚
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）——保加利亞

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Bulgarian market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. Bulgaria implements LVD directly as an EU member state with no confirmed national derogations as of mid-2026. Market surveillance is conducted by DAMTN (State Agency for Metrological and Technical Surveillance).
summary.zh: 在保加利亚市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。保加利亚作为欧盟成员国直接执行低电压指令，截至2026年中无经确认的国家豁免条款。市场监管由国家计量与技术监督局（DAMTN）实施。
summary.zht: 在保加利亞市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。保加利亞作為歐盟成員國直接執行低電壓指令，截至2026年中無經確認的國家豁免條款。市場監管由國家計量與技術監督局（DAMTN）實施。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway applicable in Bulgaria.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被适用于保加利亚的欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被適用於保加利亞的歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and instructions in Bulgarian language are all required for the Bulgarian market.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：保加利亚市场须提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志，以及保加利亚语使用说明。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低電壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：保加利亞市場須提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌，以及保加利亞語使用說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before Bulgarian/EU market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory before placing EV chargers on the Bulgarian market. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway applicable in Bulgaria; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed, along with Bulgarian-language instructions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，在保加利亚市场销售电动汽车充电器前，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足适用于保加利亚的欧盟合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据，以及保加利亚语使用说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，在保加利亞市場銷售電動汽車充電器前，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足適用於保加利亞的歐盟合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據，以及保加利亞語使用說明。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722) — Bulgaria
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——保加利亚
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——保加利亞

summary.en: Bulgarian electrical installation law and DSO/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Bulgarian installers and DSOs. Bulgaria as an EU member state implements HD 60364-7-722 through national adoption.
summary.zh: 保加利亚电气安装法律及配电运营商/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口保加利亚的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得保加利亚安装商及配电运营商接受。保加利亚作为欧盟成员国通过国家标准采用HD 60364-7-722。
summary.zht: 保加利亞電氣安裝法律及配電運營商/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口保加利亞的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得保加利亞安裝商及配電運營商接受。保加利亞作為歐盟成員國通過國家標準採用HD 60364-7-722。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722:2018 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states including Bulgaria)

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Bulgarian electrical installation standards.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合保加利亚电气安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合保加利亞電氣安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (MOHURD)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are installation standards governing fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Bulgarian/EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Bulgarian electrical codes will fail field acceptance. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Bulgarian installers and DSOs. Bulgarian-language installation instructions may be required.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置。但出口保加利亚的充电设备应依据保加利亚/欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在保加利亚电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含保加利亚安装商及配电运营商所期望的兼容性声明。可能需要提供保加利亚语安装说明书。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置。但出口保加利亞的充電設備應依據保加利亞/歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在保加利亞電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含保加利亞安裝商及配電運營商所期望的相容性聲明。可能需要提供保加利亞語安裝說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Bulgarian electrical installation law, grid codes and permitting/inspection rules. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are adopted technical standards used to demonstrate accepted installation practice in Bulgaria; product compatibility is a practical market requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD; Chinese standards are not substitutes for Bulgarian installation requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice as adopted through Bulgarian national rules. EV chargers exported to Bulgaria should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by installers and DSOs. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block field installation in Bulgaria. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通过保加利亚国家规则采纳后规范建筑侧安装实践。出口保加利亚的充电设备应与安装商及配电运营商所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍在保加利亚的现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通過保加利亞國家規則採納後規範建築側安裝實務。出口保加利亞的充電設備應與安裝商及配電運營商所期望的RCD和接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙在保加利亞的現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
